heading: Today
text: Mostly cloudy, with a few localized, passing showers. Some breaks of sun south. Showers and thunderstorms likely late near the Quebec border.  Highs in the 60s north, 70s south. Winds light and variable, becoming southeast near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Showers likely this evening from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, possibly some strong thunderstorms, edging south later this evening, then tapering off north to south. Lows in the upper 40s to upper 50s north to south. Winds south near 10 mph, becoming northerly in northern areas.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly cloudy, with a few stray showers. Periods of afternoon sun developing, with some scattered showers south. Highs 60 to 65 north, in the 60s to near 70 south. Winds light, becoming north less than 10 mph.
